tradeIn.title: Trade In Your Old Phone
tradeIn.description: Get extra cashback when you trade in your old device. Many stores offer trade-in credits that can be combined with our cashback.

benefits.title: Unlocked Phones
benefits.description: Freedom to switch carriers anytime, no contracts, no bloatware, higher resale value, and often work internationally. Pay full price upfront or through manufacturer financing.

benefits.title: Carrier Phones
benefits.description: Lower upfront costs with installment plans, carrier promotions (BOGO, trade-in deals), easy financing, and guaranteed network compatibility. May include bloatware and be locked to carrier.

priceMatch.title: Found a Better Price?
priceMatch.description: We'll help you find the best cashback rates on mobile phones. Compare prices across stores and maximize your savings.

items.question: Can I earn cashback on mobile phone plans?
items.answer: Yes! Many carriers offer cashback on new plans, upgrades, and even monthly bills. Check individual carrier terms for details.

items.question: Do trade-in phones qualify for cashback?
items.answer: Yes, the net purchase price after trade-in typically qualifies for cashback. Some stores also offer additional cashback on trade-ins.

items.question: How long does mobile cashback take to confirm?
items.answer: Mobile phone cashback typically takes 30-60 days to confirm due to return periods and carrier plan verification.

items.question: Can I combine carrier promotions with cashback?
items.answer: Yes! Most carrier promotions like BOGO deals or port-in credits can be combined with our cashback for maximum savings.

items.question: Are pre-orders eligible for cashback?
items.answer: Yes, pre-orders are typically eligible for cashback. The cashback will be confirmed after the phone ships and the return period passes.

items.question: What's better: unlocked or carrier phone?
items.answer: Unlocked phones offer flexibility to switch carriers, while carrier phones may have better upfront deals. Compare total cost including cashback.

items.question: Can I earn cashback on refurbished phones?
items.answer: Yes! Certified refurbished phones from authorized sellers typically qualify for cashback at the same rates as new phones.

items.question: Do phone insurance plans earn cashback?
items.answer: Yes, phone protection plans and AppleCare+ added during checkout are usually eligible for cashback.

final.title: Start Saving on Mobile Phones Today
